content_body: We would like to thank both the owners of The Rivers Edge and Cabin Rentals of Georgia for an outstanding vacation. Our entire family had a great time. This property is spacious, comfortable and luxurious. There was plenty to keep everyone occupied. The views from the decks and listening to the river was wonderful. I could go on and on, but let me just say we can't wait to come back!
title: Can't Wait To Come Back!
